caption: A man with dark skin, wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, black-rimmed glasses, and large black headphones, speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a yellow poster with the word "LEE" visible. To the right, clothing hangs on a rack. On-screen text and logos appear as "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" in red and white. In the initial frames, the man is actively speaking and gesturing with his right hand. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his head and looks downward, his hand moving toward the table in front of him. The camera remains static, focusing on the man from the waist up as he continues his conversation.
